decision_commentary: All 7 required questions present: project type (includes terreno/project type), budget, timeline, location (includes ownership/escrituras), special requirements, design style, site ownership. 8 required topics all covered. Questions tailored to residential coastal project — site_ownership_question specifically asks about encumbrances and prior studies, which is directly relevant to the coastal BCS site. Questions are conversational and warm in Spanish, matching the client's inbound language exactly. sent_to field present, sent_at timestamp ISO-8601. Language dimension: 5 — all questions in Spanish, exactly matching client's communication language. State sync scored 4 — deliverable does not include explicit Asana state field but real Gmail thread 19cfefe78e98fd60 confirmed in state.json. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
